messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document. Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text. Section metadata: { "node_id": "0085", "title": "新品占据收入榜单超半数历史罕见 单一品类爆发提前释放了玩家需求", "page_index": 26, "page_range": "26-1" } Section text: ## 新品占据收入榜单超半数历史罕见 单一品类爆发提前释放了玩家需求 韩国移动游戏收入榜呈现出一个历史罕见的现象：TOP10产品中超半数席位被新品占据，并且新品几乎清一色是MMORPG品类，同时多为韩国经典端游IP的改编或重启之作。同一公司在一年内“祭出”多款同赛道下的重磅产品自我竞争，显然背后有不可撼动的力量在推动；但辩证的来看，新品能历史罕见的“清洗”收入榜单，也说明韩国移动游戏市场仍充满了生命力与竞争力，来自中国游戏厂商乐牛游戏的《I9》跻身TOP10就是最好的印证之一。另一方面值得注意的是，对比往年榜单中放置、休闲、体育等多品类开花的局面，2025年的韩国手游市场产品结构显著收缩。点点数据认为这种围绕MMORPG的结构收缩更像是一种过度消耗，其他细分品类或在未来两年反而有机会释放出更大市场潜力。 2025年韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜

message.content:
This section supports retrieval for questions concerning the 2025 South Korean mobile game market performance, specifically:
- **Topics & Claims:** What historical anomaly occurred in the 2025 KR mobile revenue TOP 10? (New releases occupied over half the slots, predominantly MMORPGs adapted from classic Korean PC IPs). How has the market structure changed compared to previous years? (Shifted from multi-genre diversity to MMORPG-dominated contraction, potentially indicating overconsumption). What is the near-term market outlook? (Other sub-genres may unlock greater potential in the next 1–2 years). Which foreign titles broke into the top tier? (Chinese developer 乐牛游戏’s 《I9》 entered TOP 10, demonstrating market vitality).
- **Entities:** Top-grossing games (天堂M, 无尽冬日, Last War:Survival, 奥丁：神判, 洛奇M, 吸血鬼, 七骑士 Re:BIRTH, RF ONLINE NEXT, 枫之谷：放置冒险记, I9, 奔奔王国, 尤弥尔传奇, 不休旅途:绘卷世界, 缔造者:放逐之地) and their publishers (NCSOFT, 点点互动, First Fun, Kakao Games, NEXON, 网石游戏, 乐牛游戏, 娱美德, 4399, DRIMAGE).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Full-year 2025 revenue period. Specific launch months for top new releases (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Aug, Oct 2025). Future projection window: next two years.
- **Tables & Metrics:** Contains two structured tables: (1) 2025 Overall Revenue TOP 10 (rank, game, publisher, annual revenue in 亿元, YoY growth rate); (2) 2025 New Release Revenue TOP 10 (rank, game, publisher, annual revenue, overall rank, launch month). Key metrics include 天堂M (44.82亿元, -20.72%), 无尽冬日 (24.74亿元, +72.62%), and new release revenues spanning 2.27–13.05亿元.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative financial data (revenue, growth rates), temporal data (launch dates), comparative genre analysis, and publisher performance tracking. Source: 点点数据 autonomous research. No definitions or procedural content is present.
